summary:
DEMONIC VISIONS AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon discusses the importance of not empowering spiritual darkness through speech, focusing instead on divine authority. He recounts a spiritual vision of a building in New York covered by a demonic spell, where a demonic bull entity gains strength from the blood of aborted fetuses, specifically late-term abortions. Brandon maps a spiritual triangle connecting this entity to locations in France, Canada, Boston, and Spain. He states that politicians and celebrities, masked and engaged in satanic practices, are aiding an Antichrist spirit attempting to destroy the United States.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND INTERCESSION: Brandon asserts that political measures like the Save America Act are insufficient without a moral awakening and a return to holiness within the church. He prophesies upcoming revivals across Cuba, Venezuela, Colombia, and Brazil, declaring a time of deliverance for Latino communities and other regions globally. He emphasizes the necessity of intense intercession, describing it as spiritual groaning and likening the power of the Holy Spirit to a river capable of moving massive obstacles. He encourages the practice of praying in tongues, referencing teachings by Kenneth E. Hagin.

HISTORICAL PATTERNS AND TARGETS FOR PRAYER: Brandon identifies the timeframe around April 18th to the 20th as a period of high satanic activity, linking it to historical tragedies such as the Columbine massacre, the Oklahoma City bombing, the Deepwater Horizon oil spill, and the Waco siege. He urges focused prayer for various events and infrastructure, specifically mentioning the Boston Marathon, the Coachella festival, the Red Cross, the NBA playoffs, and vital resources like oil refineries, the power grid, and water facilities.

POLITICAL LEADERSHIP AND CONTROVERSIAL LEGISLATION: Brandon calls for targeted prayer for political leaders, including JD Vance and Marco Rubio, foreseeing their rising influence and need for protection. He issues a specific warning regarding President Trump, claiming a demonic spirit of witchcraft is attacking his mind to cause confusion. Additionally, Brandon shares reports concerning California Assembly Bill 2624, asserting that the legislation aims to criminalize investigative journalism that exposes fraud within immigrant communities, and he criticizes Gavin Newsom's political ambitions.

TRIBULATION PROPHECIES AND GLOBAL ALLIANCES: Brandon connects a recent news story about the Pope forming alliances with Muslim leaders in Algeria to a vision he had in 2014, where he saw the Pope standing next to the Antichrist. He also references a report about Japan banning designer babies, which he links to a previous vision of China creating genetically modified super soldiers. Furthermore, Brandon details a vision of severe civil unrest and anarchy in America, describing militias controlling the Mississippi River and Texas separating itself with heavily guarded borders to resist a northern beast system, events he associates with the biblical tribulation period.
rawData: [April 15, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/tMmRhBhwYSc]-[I'm excited to be here tonight. I have some things on my heart that the Lord showed us last night right at the end. Whenever the river hit, whenever I felt the river pulling me, seeing all that we were seeing, it was amazing. I didn't want to get out of it, but I got tired. Flesh is flesh, and I want it to be accurate; you don't want to add to or take away from anything, so I have to rest. I'm thankful for all of you who prayed with us and are ready to pray. Tonight, we're going to go over the darkness. I don't talk about darkness. Even whenever I talk to some family and they talk about darkness, I don't talk about it. I'm going to be real with you. Sister Billie always—she doesn't talk about darkness. The elders that I'm around don't talk about darkness; they have authority over it. We give no place for the devil. We don't talk about what he's doing very often. We just pray and know what the Lord is showing us, and we don't get into the drama of it. We know there's a dark side and witchcraft. We understand that, but we know we have power and authority over the darkness, so we don't give voice to it. Life and death are in the power of your tongue. The more you start speaking death, it tries to manifest around you. The more you glorify the devil, he'll manifest around you. I glorify Jesus. When I say glorify the devil, I mean giving him any place in your mouth. I don't want to talk about him. He's a loser. Why talk about a loser? I talk about the winner who triumphed over death, hell, and the grave and whipped him once and for all. We're going to give Jesus all the praise. Everything I say out of my mouth, I give all glory to God. I'm not going to sit there and talk about what the devil's doing all the time in the satanic realm, but tonight we're going to talk a little bit about some things the Lord showed us. It's not giving the devil any credit; we already know he's defeated. We're educating so you aren't blinded by the snares of evil. That's where we're going to go tonight; we'll touch on it. Father, we thank you. We dedicate this prayer time to you, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We apply the blood over our internet. Father, I thank you that our internet remains strong in this time of prayer and that it will not go in and out. I thank you that it's a tool and that it works like it's supposed to and will not break down and buffer. Thank you, Lord. We have a clear connection as we pray over our nation and our president. We're so grateful and give you glory, honor, and praise that it's none of us and all of you. In Jesus' name, amen. All right, I guess we'll start. Good evening, family. Thank you for being here again tonight. We're going to go over immediately what we saw in the spirit last night. There's a lot to what the Lord showed us, especially at the last part; it was amazing. We're going to go over that and jump right into this because I don't want to take a lot of your time. We want to jump right into prayer. There's much to pray about. As we were driving around today and doing what God had us to do with our business, he showed us a lot about what was coming. As I was driving, the Lord said, 'I have things for you to do right now.' I was caught up, and the Lord was allowing me, as I'm driving down the highway, to see an open-eye vision. I told Dee, 'Write this all down and record it because the Lord is warning and talking about the attacks upon America, the attacks upon the church, and where we are in these last of the last days.' It was amazing. But that's not for tonight. What the Lord has for today is what we saw last night. This is a high-alert time. As we prayed last night, we saw the Illuminati triangle. We saw the 1500s. Sorry, I'm so used to saying 1920s and all that. In the 1500s, we were taken to France. We saw a building in New York City. I texted you the picture, Braden. I texted you the exact building that I saw because I asked the Father where it was and he showed me. In this building, I saw—not that one, baby, it's similar to that. I don't know because I don't want 'Sister Clipboard' going and trying to find out who these people are. That's why I have to be so careful; you have people that are very immature following us. I want you to know this building. Don't show that one, Braden. I feel a check about it. You can show this; there's plenty of people living in there. That building I was shown in the spirit. As I was shown it, I saw a demonic covering over the building. I saw witchcraft, which were protection spells. It was thick and purple. As you try to penetrate it with prayer, I saw demonic spirits being sent out of it. I heard duchesses. I heard certain royalties in the realm of the spirit—demonic royalties. People that have sold out to the devil. As I was looking, I saw generational bloodlines that went back clear into France, into beautiful mansions. You can show those places in France if you need to. I saw places like this. I don't know if you should show it or not. Just leave it alone, baby, because it's getting too close to people's names. So I saw these places. The Lord showed me that there was this place in France, and I saw bats all at the top of this in the spirit realm that were connected to satanic practice. But as I was praying into this last night, I saw the blood of the innocent. I saw a bull on two legs standing upright. That was a demonic spirit with great horns and a nose ring. It was standing as a shadow up by New York, gaining strength from the sacrifice of the blood of the innocent. As women would have abortions, it would give this demonic entity strength from the blood of the innocent. I saw little fetuses that were formed, where you could almost tell it was a baby, which would give it more strength. The more developed the baby was—not just an embryo, but more developed—the more strength this demonic entity got. It wanted full-term abortion, up to birth; it got great strength from dismembering and satanic practice from child sacrifice. This demonic being had great horns and was very pronounced, but it was attached to France and Canada. There was a line that went from the New York and Boston area to Toronto, France, and Spain, building what looked like a triangle. It was like a pyramid of a cord trying to build a demonic stronghold through this demonic bull that was standing upright. As I saw this, I saw celebrities and politicians. And He said, "We were praying over the Save America Act," and we could see what was blocking this. Certain people with great power were paid off by demonic positions in the spirit realm. They had masks on their faces; they looked like they were at a masquerade party. You couldn't see who they were because they had masks on their faces. I saw some of them had purple and black outfits on, and they were performing satanic practices, getting ready for an Antichrist spirit to destroy the United States of America. And I saw, "Save America! Save America!" The only thing that will save America in a Save America Act is America turning back to God. I saw that the Lord said the only thing that will save America is an awakening unto God. It's not about a Save America Act, no matter how much we want that passed; it's about an awakening in the church—that the church would rise up with a backbone like a crowbar and preach righteousness and holiness back in the pulpits. He said, "The abortion issue is part of a moral issue of promiscuity, being out of wedlock." You don't ever hear very often about husbands and wives married having abortions; it is usually people who are promiscuous outside of marriage. A lot of it, I saw, was a moral issue. I was behind the pulpit preaching righteousness, holiness, and the glory. And as I saw the glory come into the churches, people weren't out sleeping around; people weren't doing the things that they shouldn't be doing. The glory of the Lord was rising on the church, and the people were getting set free. And He said, "This is like the Welsh Revival; go back to it—the bars shut down, things changed." And He said, "I'll do the same thing in America and around the world, Brandon, if we bring the church back to where it should be—preaching holiness, preaching repentance, and getting ready for the coming of the Lord Jesus." I saw the shaking in the church, a shaking in the pulpits across America, and a major revival is about to take place. As we were praying and interceding, I could see this demonic being and what was going on with these buildings. I saw Cuba, and the Lord said, "This is the day of deliverance; it's come." I heard the sounds of the horns playing like it was in the Ten Commandments movie with Charlton Heston. And that was what was playing over, "Arise, oh Israel, behold the dawn of freedom." That's what I heard over Cuba. And the Lord said, "A great revival is coming to Cuba, to Venezuela, to Colombia, and to Brazil." I heard the sounds of the horns, and He said, "It's the day of deliverance. It's time to birth this in the spirit realm concerning the revival that's about to take place for the Latino community." Last night, I heard the sounds of those horns blowing across the land. It was a blast, blast, blast across Cuba. The Lord said, "It's time. The day of the breakthrough is here. Proclaim this for the people of Cuba." Like in that movie, it's, "Oh, people of Colombia and these areas, it's time for the greatest revival you've ever seen before." I saw breakthrough after breakthrough in the spirit realm last night concerning Cuba, Colombia, and all these other areas. So, I'm excited for that, but I'm also excited for what He's going to do in Africa, Asia, Europe, and everywhere in between. It's time to get excited for what God is going to do in your community. Then He showed us Coachella, and I saw a demonic play in Coachella with snakes rising up as spirits coming out to cause major disruptions for some kind of an event. We were praying over Boston for the marathon, praying over the Red Cross, and what's happening on the 20th. And the Lord, all of a sudden, had us praying for 89ers Day in Guthrie, Oklahoma, praying over our oil wells and facilities in Houston and Tuttle, Oklahoma—places that refine major amounts of oil—praying for our troops in the Middle East, and specifically praying for our Vice President and our President for protection over their lives. The Lord showed us the attack that was coming against President Trump's mind, that he was not thinking like he normally does. He's not firing on all cylinders like we have seen him in the past. This is not the Trump of even a year ago. The Lord said, "This is a demonic attack against his mind. Pray for him." People say, "Well, I don't believe it." No, listen to what I'm telling you. The Lord said it. You must pray for his mind. I'm telling you by the Spirit of the Lord, we need to pray for his mind—pray for him to be sharp. That spirit that was attacking Biden is trying to wrap itself around our President's mind to create confusion. It is a spirit of witchcraft trying to take him out. I saw it coming over like a fog on his mind and on his eyes. The Lord said, "Do you see these scales trying to come upon him? You must pray for our President." We had to get him across the finish line. So we will continue to intercede for our President, for the Vice President, the cabinet, Homeland Security, the FBI, the CIA, and all the people keeping us safe. I believe that God has given these people great wisdom, that they know the enemy's plans before they do it. I saw apartment complexes that they had cased and looked into with drone footage, trying to find an open door to attack electric plants, our electric grid, and our water facilities in the days ahead. And the Lord said, "Stop this in prayer." That's why I believe you're here tonight. The Lord said, "I want you to go back and look at every event that has taken place in the past concerning this time frame when I warned you." April 18th. He circled it: April 18th, which is Saturday. He said, "Pray over today." It is Thursday. We have tomorrow, then Friday, then Saturday. So we're almost there. He said, "Go back and look at what the devil has done during this time frame during the past couple decades, and we're going to show you the importance of our prayers this week." A lot of you sent articles to Diana about the occult, talking about how this is a high satanic week. You can read some of that real quick. Go ahead if you feel led. Well, it's just what someone sent me. It says, according to various occult calendars, April includes significant dates often associated with ritualistic practices. A prominent date is April 19th, sometimes cited as the start of a 13-day period ending on May 1st or May Eve. The key April dates often mentioned in occult calendars would be April 19th through May 1st, a 13-day period sometimes referred to as the blood sacrifice time in some occult traditions. April 19th is often cited as the high ritual day centered around fire and sacrifice. This is why this is going to be so important for what we share next. Show this. The Lord said, "Pay attention. I saw the vision of Hitler." And he said, "Remember, they're conjuring." Is it not the word conjure, summons, whatever? They're bringing forth the Hitler spirit by blood sacrifice from virgin girls, and I saw them doing this in Berlin. Look at this. April 20th of 1889 was Hitler's birth. He died on April 30th of 1945. The Lord showed us that and he said, "This is the spirit behind it. It's Antichrist. It's about extermination and just killing people." He was crazy. Everybody knows what Hitler did. Then he said, "This is very important. You need to know this. There are satanic ties to this." Go next. April 20th of 1999, we had the massacre in Columbine High School that happened in Colorado. It was a terrible event. Then we had the Oklahoma City bombing on April 19th of 1995. How many times has the Lord warned us to pay attention to Timothy McVeigh? You all can tell me in the comment section how many times the Lord has said, "Remember Timothy McVeigh." The Lord said the same way, fertilizer, pray over this time frame of April 19th. Do you see that? It's a pattern. Now look, April 20th of 2010, the Deepwater Horizon oil spill. Remember the BP oil spill? It flooded all of the Gulf with oil, and it spread, and they couldn't figure out how to turn it off. It was only by the leading of the Lord that helped that get capped down in the deep water. That oil was just pouring into the Gulf of Mexico and it was washing all over the beaches in New Orleans. Does anybody remember that in 2010? It was a very serious issue, and the Lord helped us fix that. That happened on April 20th. On April 19th, 1993, there was a 51-day standoff involving the branch of David Koresh. Does anybody remember David Koresh? Waco, Texas happened on April 19th. Same time frame. The FBI raided it and all those people perished in Waco, Texas. I remember as a little boy, they ran in and it caught on fire. Tell me in the comment section if you remember that. Some of you are too young to remember this, but it was a major deal. It was on live television around the clock. The Revolutionary War started April 19th, 1775. The American Revolutionary War started on April 19th, 1775. This is a very high-alert week. That's what the Lord was showing me. I bring all this to you so you see it's not normal. All these evil events and other crazy things have happened during this time frame. Why? The Lord said specifically to pray for Boston. The Warsaw Ghetto Uprising began on April 19th, 1943, when Jewish resistance fighters refused to surrender to Nazi forces and launched an armed revolt against the deportation of the remaining population. When was the Tulsa massacre, the race riots in Tulsa? No, that's May 31st. But I think it's interesting, as we were praying, the Lord was showing this demonic-looking bull that was requiring blood sacrifice from abortions. The Lord said the reason they fight for it so much is because this entity is crying out for the blood of the innocent and it gives them power. It's attached to the Illuminati and the darkness of the deep state where we are with the occult and the rising up of the Mahdi, the Antichrist, and the Antichrist system agenda 2030, and the darkness that tries to embrace this nation. Trump has said it a million times, "They're not after me. They're after you. I'm just in the way." He knows what the darkness is, but he acts different. There's something wrong. What do they have on him? What is going on with him? Where is this demonic influence suddenly coming from? You have to ask yourself some questions. Why are we seeing what we're seeing right now? The Lord warned me about the 18th and he circled it. He said, "Pray over this time frame concerning Coachella and Justin at Coachella, praying over these young people." I saw a bunch of girls acting like hoochie mamas, promiscuous. They need to act like little ladies. But the boys weren't acting any better. I'm not trying to pick on girls. But the Lord warned me as I saw the snake rising up in Coachella and the Lord said, "You got to pray over this." I saw writing and major events. When did that event happen in Texas where they stampeded? It was the dark concert he had where they were listening to all the voices and said the atmosphere shifted. Does anybody remember that? He was the African-American guy with braids who dated Kylie Jenner. Travis was his name. Travis. When did that event happen? It's the same kind of spirit over the concert whenever that happened down in Houston and all those people were trampled. That was November 5th. It was like a demonic rush. It was Travis Scott. Pray against stuff like that. I'm trying to tell you the Lord warned me about the 18th. Pray for Coachella. Pray for these events around America that there will be a covering. It's interesting as we put all this together by the leading of the Holy Spirit. We've studied this and tried to figure out what else is linked to this. This is not coincidence. The Lord's circling this and telling us to watch the Red Cross. I said it's not about the Red Cross, it's not about race, it's about the hospitals. Pray for the hospitals. The Lord said pray for the NBA playoffs; they start on the 18th. The Lord said, "Pray for the NBA playoffs, specifically Boston and New York." I bring all that to you tonight because I think it's interesting. The other part is what Braden is about to show you. Look at this. Can you play his video? Elon Musk is, I think he's so funny. California legislators are trying to make investigating fraud illegal. That's what Elon Musk put on his X, and then he reposted what Nick Shirley said. Nick Shirley said California is trying to pass a bill that would criminalize investigative journalism with misdemeanors, $10,000 fines, imprisonment, and content takedown. The proposed bill is titled AB 2624 and was made after I exposed mass fraud by immigrant groups in America. Under AB 2624, government-funded entities like the Somali Learning Daycare Centers would be protected from being exposed if they operated inside California. The enemy truly is within. When our politicians would rather protect fraudsters and illegal migrants, it's time for us to stand up or face mass oppression from the traitors who rule over us. This should tell you everything. They want to prosecute and put people in jail for exposing fraud. So, if you expose the fraud, they want to give you—this is the law they want to pass in California—a $10,000 fine if you expose the fraud. What? Where are we at? That's what I'm telling you. Expose widespread fraud all across America. Quite frankly, states like Minnesota and California are just the worst at letting fraud take place, especially inside of immigrant communities—for instance, the Somalians in Minnesota and then the Armenians in California. And so now they're trying to silence anybody who exposes fraud inside of California. For instance, if this bill is passed, the Quality Learning Center that was in Minnesota would be protected from being exposed. That is absolutely crazy. And the crazy thing about this is the person who's proposing this bill, her name is Mia Bonta. Her husband is the attorney general of California. And so let's say you expose fraud; this is what could happen to you inside the state of California: you could get a misdemeanor, a $10,000 fine, imprisonment, and your content forced to be deleted. That is absolutely crazy. It is time for people to either stand up or we face mass oppression from those that rule us. California Democrats advance—crazy. We don't want you to expose our fraud because now we're upset that you're exposing it. And if you expose it, we're going to pass laws against you and we'll have you thrown in prison for exposing our fraud, because you're the bad guy, not us. We're going to give you a $10,000 fine if you try to expose it, and they're trying to make it a law. Where are we at? My goodness, folks. When I thought that has to be a lie, let's look. When Elon Musk was talking about it, I thought, 'Wow, this is America. Wow.' We've got to pray. This is part of what I believe the Lord is telling us. I told you I saw great corruption that was worse than any other place in California. Well, Gavin Newsom is a snake. And I saw him on his belly slithering like a snake to try to go to the White House in the days ahead. I see he's licking the ground like a serpent with a blue cape on and a mask. And we see this darkness rising up, a darkness over this area. Why is it that this young man, Nick Shirley, has to be the one uncovering all this? Why are our politicians not involved in this? Why is a YouTuber doing this? This is ridiculous. Why does a YouTuber have to worry about having a law brought up about his name? Because we've got a lot of other corrupt politicians on the right and the left that are just as bad. You say, 'Well, it's not just Democrats; it's Republicans, too.' And that's what the Lord said. He said, 'You're just looking at the left, but the right's just as guilty. There's a lot of the right that is bad and they're just hiding.' They hide underneath the face of Christianity and other things, and they use it as a manipulation. You go, 'Well, we're Christians over here,' and you're going, 'They're bad, they're bad.' And the Lord said, 'Just because they don't come out with devil horns and a pitchfork, it doesn't mean they're good.' Most people want to embrace them. They say they love Jesus, and I'm like, 'Well, okay. All right. Well, praise God.' But we've got to come up higher. Why is Nick the only one uncovering this? Why is this young man the one doing this by himself? What is going on with this? 'We're going to pass a law against you. We're going to throw you in jail.' My goodness. When I told you I went to the tribulation, I said when the abomination of desolation takes place, there's a man standing next to the Antichrist. I said he is this man right here, and he's still there. Remember the Pope? I said he stands next to the Antichrist in the days ahead. And there's another man that looks like a Muslim. He's kind of dark-skinned with glasses, remember? And he has a hat on that's black. He wears a black outfit that looks like a funny-looking hat. And I say he stands on the other side of the Antichrist. Remember I said he's skinny? He has a pronounced jawline. Pope Leo has a pronounced jawline. Look, there he is. And now look at the other guy beside him. They're friends now. You all don't realize how close we are; it's all happening right in front of your face. I told Braden, 'That's the guy that stands on the other side of the Antichrist. He's in the outfit right there.' I said, 'Who is he?' So Braden did research on him; he's a Muslim. They are all trying to join Christianity and Muslims together. We need to be friends. Pope Leo is receiving massive criticism after appearing to promote an alliance between Muslims and Catholics during his trip to Algeria—not only showing up shoeless and signing the golden book inside Algeria's Grand Mosque, but also declaring it a space proper to God. I said they're going to bring a one-world religion soon, and you're going to see this. And I said the Pope will stand next to the Antichrist in the days ahead. The words say 'space proper to God,' but the title says 'space proper to God.' I don't know which one it is. It's a space proper to God. So, it's a place where it's okay; it's a friendly place. And I said the man—the only one that's missing is the Antichrist, and he's not in the middle, but they're walking identically how they walk and stand up when the abomination of desolation takes place. That's when I told you Jesus was standing with me. He said, 'Watch this,' and they're standing identical in this picture. The only one that's missing is the Antichrist in the middle. Look at that. I've waited for this moment since July 6, 2014. I went to the tribulation. I told everybody, 'Watch what happens.' And the Pope, this Pope right here—I said the last one was too fat; it can't be him because you could see his pronounced jawline. I said I could look at him up on top of the abomination of desolation. I was looking at it with Jesus, and I saw his jawline, and I said it's a Pope that has the same halo hat and does it all, but he's a white man. And I said he stands up there next to the Antichrist, and I remember looking at his face because his jawline was glistening from the oils of his skin, and I could see it from up top as the lightning was striking. It's the same man. It's him. The other guy standing next to him is this guy and it looks just like him. I say he has glasses, so maybe he's not. People throw eggs at me all the time. I try to tell you as much as I can. And the Lord told me, 'Listen, I've warned you all over and over again how close we are to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ.' What is the Lord waiting on? He's waiting on a major harvest. I have long patience, but I'm out of time, Brennan. This dispensation of grace is coming to an end. There is a marker in the spirit realm. What are we looking for? I believe we're about to see one of the greatest harvests of souls this world has ever seen. As he signs things and the Pope signs this, signs the book, and does all these things, and they're all hanging out together, what are we about to see? Where are we at in all that we see all around us? Look what's happening with the war and all this stuff. Right. Interesting. So, all right. You want to read any of this? It kind of changed the atmosphere. Okay. I feel like we did okay here with that. I brought everything out, right? Yes. Okay. It's good of what we see today in the news. Anything else from Trump or anything? You don't want to say nothing? What is he doing today? He said that he walked the Strait and then China says blockade is dangerous and irresponsible, right? So, all right. Greed. It's good. I like it when you read to me. I've seen it: meetings full of hype, noise, even passion, but the altar remains untouched. Why? Because the ground wasn't broken in prayer. You can't reap where no one has plowed. The altar is not a magic space; it's a manifestation of what's already been birthed in intercession. Empty altars reveal empty prayer closets. The tears in secret become fire in public. The altars that overflowed during Finney's meetings weren't the result of his gift. They were the result of my tears. I cried in secret until the ground groaned for salvation. If you want to see weeping at the altar, you must first weep on the floor. Heaven answers seeded ground. No intercession, no harvest. Don't blame the people. Blame the preparation. Too many blame the congregation when revival doesn't fall. But I ask: who prayed? Who fasted? Who groaned? Who interceded with travail until the Spirit hovered over the gathering? Altars don't fall by accident. They fill when intercessors dig deep wells in prayer. How to fill the altars with heaven's glory: break up the ground in prayer. Tear down resistance before the people arrive. Saturate the meeting. Pray over every seat, every soul, every moment. Invite holy conviction. Ask the Spirit to rest heavy before the first note is sung. 'Holy Spirit, let no altar be empty because I failed to pray. Use my tears to water the soil of revival. Let my intercession prepare the way for souls to come running. Break the ground through me. Shake the atmosphere through me. Let altars burn with conviction, glory, and transformation.' The true intercessor—this is the watchman who never leaves their post. The true intercessor is always on guard. You don't clock out when you carry heaven's burden. You don't pray once and walk away. You stay on the wall. You watch, you wait, you discern, you press. I was a watchman and I never left my post. Even when the meetings were done, I stayed because I knew the war wasn't over; it was only beginning. Intercession isn't a moment; it's a mantle. You must monitor the spiritual atmosphere. There were nights when I felt the atmosphere shift mid-revival. Complacency tried to creep in, demonic pushback surged, and I knew I couldn't leave my watch. I had to war again, fast again, groan again. Just because revival starts doesn't mean it continues. Watchmen sustain what others initiate. God is looking for watchmen in this generation. The wall is too empty, the gaps are too wide. The pulpits are full, but the prayer closets are abandoned. The church needs watchmen, intercessors who don't just pray once, but who own the ground with persistence. Be the one who never leaves your post. True intercession is often lonely. No crowd, no applause, no social media updates. Just you, the carpet, and the groan. I lived it. Most of my breakthroughs were birthed alone, because revival begins in isolation before it ever reaches the masses. God doesn't need a crowd to start a move; He just needs one willing voice in the wilderness. Are you willing to be that one? Don't resent the loneliness. Heaven watches. The Lord is near to those who weep in private. Every cry you've whispered, He's caught it. Every groan, He's recorded it. Every lonely night, you were never truly alone. The solitary intercessor is never invisible to God. I never saw most of the fruit I prayed for, but years later, the cities I groaned over would erupt in revival.
